name: Paty Path
description: Run, jump, and dodge obstacles in a fast-paced casual runner! Run, dodge obstacles, and complete exciting levels! Jump over obstacles, avoid crashes, and reach the finish line in every level. Collect coins, unlock rewards, and customize your character as you progress. Features: Level-based runner gameplay Reach the finish line in each level Collect coins and unlock rewards Customize your character Simple and addictive controls Start now and complete all levels!
instructions: Run dodge obstacles and complete exciting levels Jump over obstacles avoid crashes and reach the finish line in every level Collect coins unlock rewards as you progress - Move Left A Left Arrow - Move Right D Right Arrow - Jump W Up Arrow
